# Documentation Update Rules

After each bug-fix cycle, update if applicable:
- API behavior docs if contract changed.
- Runbook notes if operational steps changed.
- README/setup docs if workflow changed.
- Known issues list if partial fix or workaround exists.
- Bug fix log entry for auditability.

Minimum required:
- One bug log entry in `docs/bugs/bug-fix-log.md`.
- One concise post-fix report.
